Description: Build a platform for creating, managing, and monitoring 5G network slices across multiple enterprise tenants with real-time SLA enforcement. Support URLLC, eMBB, and mMTC slice types with automated scaling policies and multi-tenant isolation.

Implement ML-based anomaly detection on network telemetry streams (gNB, UPF, AMF) with automated root cause analysis, remediation playbooks, and PagerDuty/ServiceNow integration for incident escalation.

Build a unified developer portal for 800+ engineers integrating Jira, GitHub, CI/CD pipelines, DORA metrics, golden path templates, and AI-assisted code generation. Include service catalog, API marketplace, and onboarding workflows.

Engineering intelligence platform providing C-level visibility into deployment frequency, lead time, MTTR, change failure rate, AI adoption ratios, sprint velocity trends, and team health metrics across 50+ squads.

Decompose monolithic BSS order management into event-driven microservices aligned with TMForum Open APIs (TMF622, TMF641). Support TRAI compliance, real-time order orchestration, and fallback to legacy systems during migration.

Build a unified customer data platform aggregating CRM, billing, network usage, support tickets, and digital engagement data. Expose real-time APIs for personalized offers, churn prediction, and next-best-action recommendations.

Summary: API Gateway & Rate Limiting for Partner Ecosystem
Description: Implement an enterprise API gateway with OAuth 2.0 / mTLS authentication, per-partner rate limiting, usage metering, and a self-service developer portal for third-party integrations with AT&T network APIs.

Build an automated compliance platform that continuously validates SOC 2 Type II, GDPR, FCC, and 3GPP controls across all delivery artifacts. Generate evidence packages, audit trails, and change advisory board (CAB) reports.

Design and implement a multi-access edge computing (MEC) orchestration layer for deploying and managing containerized workloads at cell-site edge locations. Support latency-sensitive applications with sub-10ms SLA guarantees.

Build an intelligent incident management system with automated severity classification, runbook execution, blast radius analysis, stakeholder notification, and structured postmortem generation with action item tracking.
